title: Move telemetry events inside quiescence loop with cycle_index
description: In `src/agent_takt/cli/commands/run.py`, move the `scheduler_cycle_started` event (currently emitted once before the loop, lines 114–118) and the `scheduler_cycle_completed` event (currently emitted once after, lines 137–143) so that each fires once per loop iteration, inside the loop. Add a `cycle_index` integer field to both event payloads. The `scheduler_cycle_started` event fires at the top of each iteration (before `run_once`); `scheduler_cycle_completed` fires after result accumulation (before the break check). The final CLI summary lines (cycle summary + final state + JSON dump) remain a single end-of-run report outside the loop.
acceptance_criteria: `scheduler_cycle_started` is recorded inside the loop with a `cycle_index` field (1-based).
`scheduler_cycle_completed` is recorded inside the loop with a matching `cycle_index` field.
Both events are no longer recorded outside the loop.
A run with 3 cycles produces 3 `scheduler_cycle_started` and 3 `scheduler_cycle_completed` events.
The final JSON summary block (keys: started, completed, blocked, correctives_created, deferred_count, final_state) is still emitted once at the end, unchanged in structure.
